headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Solstice Advanced Mat, Raises Price Target to $100
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Solstice Advanced Mat (NASDAQ:SOLS) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $94 to $100.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Solstice Advanced Mat, Raises Price Target to $101
summary: BMO Capital  analyst John McNulty   maintains Solstice Advanced Mat (NASDAQ:SOLS) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $92 to $101.
